description: Maroon kurta in a crushed material, has a round neck, stitched pintucks, half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and a vented hem   Style Note   This simply styled kurta from w is just right for Summer '12. It goes easy on the prints (perfect for when you want a change from the tribal prints we've seen so much of) and styles its silhouette simply without fussy design details. Pair this with either a blingy pair of leggings for an over-the-top ethnic look (the minimalistic kurta will balance out the loud leggings) or simply style it with monochrome ones for a sunny day out.   Product Details   Tomato red kurta in a crushed material, has a U-neck, stitched pintucks and lace detail at the yoke, half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and a vented hem   Material and Care   100% cotton   Wash dark colours separately   Do not bleach   Dry inside out in shade   Warm iron; do not iron on decorations   Size and Fit   Regular fit   model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a siMaroon kurta in a crushed material, has a U-neck, stitched pintucks and lace detail at the yoke, half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and a vented hem
